description: one Daily Chieftain D M MAURS Editor Daily per Week bv Carrier 10 Cents Daily pur Month by Mail 40 Cents Telephone No 44 Wednesday VINITA I T Sept 13 The lid is on in Vinita generally The weeds were not cut but it was not the fauit of the press The biggest thing that is going on Chelsea fair this week is the The Chieftain has arranged for a reliable report of the Cherokee National council that will convene next Monday at Tahlequah Every Cherokee citizen wiil be especially interested in the work of this the last session of the tribal legislature Chief Rogers will set forth in his message the work to be taken up by the council This council will also interest other residents of the Cherokee Nation as it will have its bearing on the gen eral development of the Territory The roving diasatisfied element are not town build ersnor are they country builders either The man who is always ready to pull ud stakes and move is a floater and like an ocean derelict is utterly useless in the com mercial enterprises of the world In this territory there are men who have tried many
